scripts.build:cf: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('.open-next','worker.js');const dst=path.join('.open-next','_worker.js');if(!fs.existsSync(src)) throw new Error('Missing '+src);fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);if(fs.existsSync(src+'.map')) fs.copyFileSync(src+'.map', dst+'.map');"
scripts.deploy: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('.open-next','worker.js');const dst=path.join('.open-next','_worker.js');if(!fs.existsSync(src)) throw new Error('Missing '+src);fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);if(fs.existsSync(src+'.map')) fs.copyFileSync(src+'.map', dst+'.map');" && wrangler deploy
scripts.preview: next build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join('.open-next','worker.js');const dst=path.join('.open-next','_worker.js');if(!fs.existsSync(src)) throw new Error('Missing '+src);fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);if(fs.existsSync(src+'.map')) fs.copyFileSync(src+'.map', dst+'.map');" && wrangler dev
